description: You are a Building Safety Consultant auditing the FZK-Haus residential model for safety compliance. The current model has no guard rails or balustrades, violating building codes. Locate the safety compliance brief on the workstation Desktop to review the requirements. Using Bonsai (BlenderBIM), add the required safety railings to the model. Ensure you assign the correct IFC class, PredefinedType, property sets, and material associations as specified in the brief. When complete, save the compliant model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_railing_compliant.ifc.
